questions.question: Write a high-quality function to generate uniform random numbers in the interval [0, 1). The function should be efficient, readable, and testable. What features should it have?
questions.hint: Consider the trade-offs between readability, performance, and flexibility

questions.question: Implement the function in a programming language of your choice. Then, explain the time complexity of the function and how you achieved it.
questions.hint: Use Big O notation to describe the time complexity

questions.question: Compare the efficiency of different methods for generating uniform random numbers in the interval [0, 1), such as the Mersenne Twister, Linear Congruential Generator, or the inverse transform method. Which method do you recommend and why?
questions.hint: Consider factors such as seed quality, period length, and convergence rate
